ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist performing the track */,
  "track_title" TEXT /* Title of the track */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability score of the track */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy level of the track */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Musical key of the track */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the track in decibels */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the track (major or minor) */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness score */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness score */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness score */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness score */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence score */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the track in beats per minute */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in milliseconds */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the track was released */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album that the track belongs to */,
  "explicit_content" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the track contains explicit content */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the track */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the track */,
  "album_track_number" INTEGER /* Position of the track in the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Primary genre of music that the artist represents */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the artist */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of social media links */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "label" TEXT /* Name of the record label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the playlist was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "privacy_status" TEXT /* Privacy status of the playlist (public or private) */,
  "collaborative" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the playlist is collaborative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist track entry */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist that contains the track */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track included in the playlist */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the track was added to the playlist */,
  "added_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the track to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_added_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("added_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., listener, curator, admin) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "subscription_plan" TEXT /* Subscription plan of the user (e.g., free, premium) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the track */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the track was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., play, download) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the track */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user when accessing the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_access_logs_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose preferences are recorded */,
  "preferred_genre" TEXT /* Preferred genre of music */,
  "liked_artists" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of artists liked by the user */,
  "preferred_tempo_range" TEXT /* Preferred tempo range of music */,
  "preferred_loudness_range" TEXT /* Preferred loudness range of music */,
  "preferred_key" TEXT /* Preferred key of music */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the music genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre */,
  "origin_country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "permission_level" INTEGER /* Permission level associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the track */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track being rated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating score given to the track */,
  "review" TEXT /* Optional review provided by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "rating_source" TEXT /* Source of the rating (e.g., user, critic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_ratings_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who commented on the track */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track being commented on */,
  "comment" TEXT /* The comment text */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "comment_source" TEXT /* Source of the comment (e.g., user, critic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_comments_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES track_comments ("comment_id")
)
